_comment: Linear MCP server. Reads are enabled; writes are denied at runtime via --disallowedTools on the agent invocation (mcp__linear__save_*, mcp__linear__create_*, mcp__linear__delete_*). Linear publishes a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.linear.app/sse; this bundle uses it via the mcp-remote shim. TODO: if Linear publishes a first-party stdio server package, swap to that.
